original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Practice Advisory for Preanesthesia Evaluation: An Updated Report by the American Society of Anesthesiologists Task Force on Preanesthesia Evaluation
original_registry_entry.population: Patients of all ages scheduled for elective general anesthesia, regional anesthesia, or moderate or deep sedation.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Preanesthesia history, physical examination, selective testing, and consultation for elective procedures.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for medical-record review, patient interview, directed airway, lung and heart examination, and selective testing including pregnancy testing when results would alter management. It is an older advisory, excludes urgent or emergency care, and does not generate tests or management.

exact_sections.heading: Appendix 1 - Preanesthesia history and physical examination
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting pertinent medical records, patient interview, directed physical examination, airway evaluation, and lung and heart examination before elective anesthesia.

exact_sections.heading: Preanesthesia testing and pregnancy testing
exact_sections.locator: PDF pages 6-9, testing discussion and Appendix 1 summary
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-selected testing based on patient and procedure characteristics and offering pregnancy testing to patients of childbearing potential when the result would alter management.

title: Practice Advisory for Preanesthesia Evaluation: An Updated Report by the American Society of Anesthesiologists Task Force on Preanesthesia Evaluation
population: Patients of all ages scheduled for elective general anesthesia, regional anesthesia, or moderate or deep sedation.
intended_setting: Preanesthesia history, physical examination, selective testing, and consultation for elective procedures.
access_limitations: One or more PDF tables require structured extraction
Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
